headline: Taco Bell visits drop 19% after lettuce parasite outbreak
summary: Investing.com -- Customer visits to Taco Bell locations fell sharply Friday following a parasite outbreak that health authorities connected to lettuce from one of the chain's suppliers.

headline: ThaiBev Weighs Sale of Thailand's Largest KFC Franchise With 500+ Restaurants
summary: ThaiBev is exploring a sale of its KFC franchise business while working with Bank of America to gauge buyer interest.

headline: QUICK SPARK: Taco Bell, Cava, Chipotle Visits Plunge on Food-Borne Parasite
summary: Taco Bell and other fast-casual chains are seeing a decline in customers due to a Cyclospora outbreak linked to contaminated lettuce.

headline: Market Chatter: Yum! Brands Says Positive Cyclospora Test on Taylor Farms Lettuce was False Positive
summary: Laboratory experts rechecked lettuce sample results tied to a cyclospora outbreak investigation and

headline: Fox News Posts On X "A major reversal in the nationwide lettuce investigation: The FDA now says a Taylor Farms sample that initially tested positive for Cyclospora was actually a false positive. After laboratory experts re-reviewed the result, the agency says there are currently no confirmed positive product samples. But the recall remains in effect as officials continue investigating an outbreak that has sickened more than 1,600 people across five states."

raw.headline: Fox News Posts On X "A major reversal in the nationwide lettuce investigation: The FDA now says a Taylor Farms sample that initially tested positive for Cyclospora was actually a false positive. But the recall remains in effect as officials continue investigating an outbreak that has sickened more than 1,600 people across five states."

headline: Wall Street Breakfast Podcast: FDA's Lettuce U-Turn
summary: The FDA reversed course on lettuce linked to Cyclospora. Samsung is cutting hundreds of U.S. jobs as it shifts operations to Texas. Apple just made iPhones more expensive in one market.
